prompt.systemPrompt: Rol: Jimmy ingeniero de pista rFactor2. Salida esperada: recomendaciones precisas, breves y trazables a la telemetria. Si se pide estructura, responde SOLO JSON estricto (objeto unico, doble comilla, sin markdown, sin texto extra). Mantiene coherencia entre especialistas y reporte final.

fallbackPolicy.finalFailureAction: Return controlled fallback payload and stop further retries for this stage.

productionRolloutAcceptanceCriteria: Runtime integration uses selectedModel=llama3.1-8B, variantId=batch_b_hybrid_strict_compact_k8_t0, topK=8, temperature=0.0 with no drift.
A regression benchmark run against the same fixture set keeps composite score >= 0.93.
chief_none and chief_invalid_json_or_missing_full_setup_sections combined rate stays <= baseline from batch_b report when retries are enabled.
Fallback path sets degraded=true and fallback_reason for all exhausted retry cases.
No runtime wiring is considered complete until JSON cleanup and retry behavior match this artifact exactly.
